hub.abaquiz_desc: Nangmah ABA thiamnak in ennak — 80%+ ah competency badge na hmuh
hub.biascheck_desc: Na data chungah a um mi pattern hna kha tuah danh in a langhter, implicit bias kha ruahnak tuah nakah — i puanglet a si lo, i ṭhanchonak a si
hub.caseload_desc: Sianginhrim vialte ennak — dinhmun langhter, ṭhanchonak rian, himhimnak ralring, le AI caseload tomhnak
hub.commlog_desc: Innchung he in pahnih-lam pehtlaihnak record, ahohpaoh tlamtling tein zoh khawh tu — innchung pakhat zong tla awk a si lo
hub.consent_desc: Innchung pa data lakhmuh nakah aw-i-pe-nak ca, na thim duh bantukin — JSON in remh, suahter, share
hub.cumrecord_desc: Skinner-style hman mi cumulative frequency graph — ABA data langhter nak rampi a si
hub.deescalate_desc: Thaw kainak, langhter mi timer, sensory ngolnak, le hi-vawl ah ngamhter nak — real-time daihter bawmhnak
hub.dtt_desc: Discrete Trial Training — trial pakhat khat ah record, mastery criteria he le auto-advance he
hub.familyvoice_desc: Innchung nih hmuh mi, hmuhnak phundang, le lawmhnak hna share awk in form — AI lehnak he
hub.ioacalc_desc: Inter-Observer Agreement he lam 6 — point-by-point, interval, scored/unscored, exact count
hub.nlabc_desc: Hmuhnak ca kha nicheih bia in ṭial asiloah pet — AI nih amah te in ABC chunghmun ah a remhter
hub.obscoach_desc: Na data lakhmuh ṭhatnak chungah real-time cawnpiaknak — a tla mi kha hmuhter, ṭhatter nak chimter, le na data kha thluachter
hub.predict_desc: AI thazang in pattern enkawhnak nih zeitik, khoika, le zei nih ziaza a thohter ti hmuhter — zohkhenh nak lam he
hub.prefassess_desc: Reinforcer hmuh awk a remh mi lam — MSWO, Paired Stimulus, le Free Operant phun
hub.quick_launch_hint: A biapi clinical hriamhrem hna — vawi khat tuk in lutter
hub.reinforcement_desc: Forh nak survey remh tukmi — sianginhrim khat khat in zeinih a forh ti, phun 6 chungah hmuhter
hub.relmap_desc: Sianginhrim pehtlaihnak hna kha langhter mi diagram — a zumh awk mi mipi upa, ṭha, innchung, hruaitu — a tla mi kha enkawhnak he
hub.scatterplot_desc: Nichuah caan × ziaza grid, caan he aa pehtlai mi pattern hmuh awknak in — ABC data in amah te in a khat
hub.selfcheck_desc: Sianginhrim hmai zoh in lungput ennak le ruahnak ca — anmah aw kha lakhmuh
hub.sessionnotes_desc: Caan langhter mi hmuhnak ca, aw in dictation he — a thluan tikah context lakhmuh
hub.socialvalidity_desc: TARF le IRP-15 ah hriamhrem, treatment cohlhnak teihnak in — chuahter awk ah a herh
hub.treatintegrity_desc: Intervention hna kha remh dan bantukin tuah a si maw ti record — component-level Fidelity zohkhenhnak
quick_fill_label: 🧠 Quick-Fill — Zei nih a tla ti chim
ph.share_what_you_notice_at_home_strengt: Inn ah na hmuh mi kha share — thazang, lungretheih, hmuhnak phundang, asiloah sianginn rian-tuanmi caah ruahnak...
toast.ai_suggestion_failed_try_again: AI ruahnak a tlu — tuah ṭhan
toast.behavior_occurred_dro_timer_reset: ⚠️ Ziaza a tla — DRO timer reset
toast.dro_interval_complete_reinforce_no: 🎉 DRO interval a tling — REINFORCE! Target ziaza a tla lo!
toast.graph_data_ready_autofill_availabl: Graph data a remh — Effect Size chungah auto-fill a um!
toast.interval_ready_reinforce_next_beha: ⏰ Interval a remh — a hnu lawng ziaza ah reinforce!
toast.mastered_n_n_consecutive_sessions_: 🎉 A THIAM CANG! N — N session a peh peh in criterion ah!
toast.not_quite_try_again: A dik dih lo — tuah ṭhan!
toast.popups_blocked_downloaded_as_html_: Pop-up hna kha rep — HTML file in chiah a si.
toast.report_generated_use_printsave_as_: Report a chuah — tab thar chungah Print/Save as PDF hmang!
toast.scenario_generation_failed_try_aga: Scenario chuahternak a tlu — tuah ṭhan
toast.simulation_started_you_are_now_the: Simulation a thawk — atu nangmah counselor na si 🎭
toast.you_have_unsaved_changes_consider_: 💡 Chiah loih thlennak na nei — na workspace chiah awk ruah.
ui.gently_surfaces_patterns_for_reflecti: Ruahnak tuah nakah pattern hna kha tuah danh in a langhter — i ṭhanchonak a si, i puanglet a si lo
ui.prebuilt_scenarios_covering_the_4_fun: Ziaza rian 4 hna a huap mi scenario remh tukmi. Offline ah tuah khawh — AI a herh lo.
ui.test_your_behavioral_analysis_knowled: Na ziaza ennak thiamnak en — badge hmuh awk ah 80%
toast_invalid_file: Workspace file a dik lo — BehaviorLens JSON a si a herh
